description_long: This object is a dark, ornate sword with a dramatic and fantasy-inspired design. The blade is broad and tapers to a sharp point, featuring intricate cutouts and layered details along its length. The crossguard is wide and wing-like, with pointed extensions that curve slightly upward, adding to its menacing appearance. The handle is straight and cylindrical, topped with a stylized pommel that echoes the angular motifs of the guard. The entire object appears to be made from a single material, giving it a monolithic and imposing look. Its silhouette is highly stylized, suggesting it is more decorative or ceremonial than utilitarian.
description: A dark, ornate sword with a broad, intricately detailed blade and a dramatic, winged crossguard. The handle is straight and topped with a stylized pommel, giving the sword a fantasy-inspired appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the ornate blade, winged crossguard, and detailed handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the sword's thin profile and the layered structure of the blade and guard.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the symmetrical design and decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the continuity of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, solid, stylized pommel, no visible grip texture
attribute_ornamentation: ornate cutouts and layered motifs on blade and guard
